# CWE-322 vulnerable — Key Exchange without Entity Authentication
lang: go
file: CWE-322-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/tls"
	"io"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// ExchangeSessionKey dials a peer relay without authenticating its certificate.
func ExchangeSessionKey(c *gin.Context) ([]byte, error) {
	peerHost := c.PostForm("relay_host")
	conn, err := tls.Dial("tcp", peerHost, &tls.Config{InsecureSkipVerify: true})
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	defer conn.Close()
	return io.ReadAll(conn)
}
